# foundry_project_organizations (Data Source)

Data source for reading a Foundry ProjectOrganizations.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "foundry_project_organizations" "example" {
  project_rid = "ri.foundry.main.project.example-project-rid"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_rid` (String) RID of the Project. (Required for data source lookup.)

### Read-Only

- `project_organizations` (Set of String) List of the RIDs of the Organizations directly applied to this Project.
